# Elchai Group

> Dubai-based AI and blockchain consultancy. We design, build and scale
> custom AI agents, generative AI, Web3 platforms, smart contracts and
> tokenization for enterprises worldwide.

## About

- Name: Elchai Group
- Founded location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates
- Headquarters: 2008, Jumeirah Business Center 1 – Cluster G, Al Thanyah Fifth, Jumeirah Lakes Towers, Dubai, UAE
- Email: info@elchaigroup.com
- Phone: +971 4 883 7176
- Area served: Worldwide
- Industries: Banking, Fintech, Logistics, Real Estate, Education, Healthcare, Retail
- Founded category: Technology consulting

## Services

### Artificial Intelligence
- AI Assistants and Agents — agentic AI, voice assistants, ChatGPT integration
- Generative AI development
- LLM development (custom large language models)
- RAG development (retrieval-augmented generation)
- AI consulting and integration
- AI automation and RPA
- Machine Learning and Computer Vision

### Blockchain
- Web3 development
- Smart contract development
- DeFi development
- DApp development
- Layer 1 and Layer 2 protocols
- Blockchain consulting
- Metaverse development

### Cryptocurrency
- Crypto wallet development (custodial and non-custodial)
- Centralized and decentralized exchanges (CEX, DEX)
- ICO, IDO, meme coin development
- Real World Asset (RWA) tokenization
- NFT marketplace development

### Mobile and App Development
- Cross-platform mobile apps
- Enterprise app development

## Industry Solutions
- AI in Banking
- AI in Fintech
- AI in Logistics
- AI in Real Estate
- AI/ML for Education
- AI in Healthcare

## Differentiators
- Dubai-based with worldwide delivery
- 5,000+ industry leaders served
- Full-stack: strategy, architecture, build, run
- Domain coverage: AI + Blockchain + Mobile under one roof
- Multi-timezone delivery teams
